meta.description: US-headquartered D2C brands selling on Amazon, Shopify, eBay, TikTok Shop, or Temu. Face rising FBA fees, multi-channel complexity, high return rates, and margin pressure.
key_proof_points: Up to 44% savings vs traditional providers

top_pain_points: Rising FBA storage and fulfillment fees eating into margins
Difficulty meeting 2-day delivery promise nationwide
High return rates from size/fit issues draining contribution margin
Single-carrier dependency causing delays during peak seasons
No real-time cross-channel inventory visibility leading to overselling
locad_value_propositions: 97.3% same-day fulfillment rate outperforms FBA for comparable SKUs
Up to 44% savings on fulfillment and storage vs FBA and traditional 3PLs
50+ carrier network eliminates single-carrier risk and reduces cost
OMS syncs inventory every 3 minutes across Amazon and Shopify
Returns management with automated restocking reduces reverse logistics cost
key_motivations: Protect margins while scaling order volume
Reduce fulfillment cost to reinvest in paid ads
Build a brand not dependent on Amazon's ecosystem
likely_objections: Can Locad really replace FBA for an early-stage brand?
Will migration disrupt our Amazon account health and seller ratings?
Is Locad proven for US brands at our volume?
How does billing compare to our current FBA setup?
icps.buying_trigger: FBA fee increase notification or first month with negative margins on a hero SKU
icps.content_that_converts: Side-by-side FBA vs Locad cost comparison, case study of a fashion brand saving 40%+ on fulfillment
